description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: San Tin Highway and Fanling Highway, Both bounds, near San Tin Interchange
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 新田公路及粉嶺公路，來回方向，近新田交匯處

2024-08-14T00:00:00.CONTENT_EN: To facilitate the works of Development of Lok Ma Chau Loop, from 11.00 p. m. on 14 August 2024 (Wednesday) to 5.30 a. m. of the following day, the San Tin Highway and Fanling Highway (both bounds) near San Tin Interchange will be fully closed to all vehicular traffic. Affected vehicles are advised to travel via Castle Peak Road or San Tin Interchange.
2024-08-14T00:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 因配合落馬洲河套地區發展工程，新田公路及粉嶺公路(來回方向)將於2024年8月14日(星期三)晚上11時至翌日上午5時30分全線封閉。駕駛人士須改經青山公路或新田交匯處

Due to road subsidence , the only lane of Tsui Ping Road (uphill bound) between Kwun Tong Road and Fuk Tong Road is closed to all traffic. 
At the same time , vehicles cannot make left turning from Kwun Tong Road onto Tsui Ping Road.   Motorists are advised to use alternative routes.   Affected KMB bus routes nos. 11B, 11C, 13M, 89, 89C, 89X have been diverted.   Traffic is busy now.

因路面下陷，翠屏道(往上山方向)介乎觀塘道與福塘道之間的唯一行車線現已封閉。
同時，車輛不能由觀塘道左轉入翠屏道。  駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。  受影響九巴巴士第11B,11C,13M,89,89C及89X號線須改道行駛。  現時上址交通繁忙。
